backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing game CRUD plus Match Word to Image question storage and retrieval with blob support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module seeding predefined games into persistent storage while preserving other actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a frontend home‑page update to specific files, components, and tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of all major frontend files for reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme definitions configuring light/dark color tokens and global styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting up the root container and loading the main React module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with routes for home, manager, and game launch pages using a shared layout.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: App layout with header navigation, content outlet, and footer branding wrapper.
frontend/src/components/ChooseCorrectIma: React component implementing shuffled image‑choice gameplay with correctness feedback and progression.
Dialog for creating image-choice questions, handling word input, image uploads, correct answer selection, validation, and submission.
Displays a list of image-choice questions with thumbnails and highlights the correct image for each question.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDeleteDia: Reusable confirmation dialog for deleting a game, showing the game name and a loading state during deletion.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Renders a game preview card with thumbnail, name, description, and tags; optionally wrapped in a link unless in manager mode.
frontend/src/components/GameEditorDialog: Dialog for editing an existing game’s details including name, description, icon, tags, and colors, with save functionality.
frontend/src/components/MatchWordToImage: Interactive game that shuffles questions and options, loads image blobs, tracks progress, and handles option selection and completion.
Dialog for creating word-to-image match questions, allowing image upload, option entry, correct answer selection, validation, and submission.
Displays a grid of match-word-to-image questions, converts image blobs to URLs, and highlights the correct option.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity and invalidates queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on games and questions using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/assets.ts: Exports static asset paths such as the app logo and placeholder image.
frontend/src/lib/externalBlob.ts: Converts ExternalBlob objects to object URLs, creates blobs from files, and provides a hook for URL lifecycle management.
frontend/src/lib/gameConstants.ts: Defines predefined game metadata, IDs, and helpers for merging backend games with predefined data.
frontend/src/lib/shuffle.ts: Implements Fisher-Yates shuffling and option shuffling that tracks the correct answer.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/GameLaunchPage.tsx: Loads a game by ID, fetches its questions based on type, handles loading and errors, and renders the appropriate game component. Displays fallback UI for missing metadata or empty question sets.
frontend/src/pages/GameManagerPage.tsx: Fetches all questions for both game types and provides a tabbed interface to view, create, and edit them. Handles loading, errors, and opens question editor dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Fetches all games, merges them with predefined ones, and displays them as selectable cards while handling loading and error states. Shows empty-state messaging if no games are available.
frontend/src/types/chooseCorrectImage.ts: Defines the type for choose‑correct‑image questions, including word prompts, images, and the correct image index.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS theme, colors, animations, and plugins including typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Represents the current project state, including existing features, pending requests, known issues, and metadata for the Rehab Game Hub project.
